wall_of_misses.notes: We should add awareness to that released song, and the artist mood should be more severe (-8)

tuesday_superstition.notes: this should cost money - we are signing and artist. junior should be most expensive.

showcase_slot.notes: Money should be -$35000 (prime_friday) and -$10000 (early_doors). Artist Mood should be -8 (keep_cutting)

second_album_syndrome.notes: Approve, but quality_bonus (and variance_up) must bank to THE artist, not label-wide — right now the next recording session to generate songs eats the bonus, whoever it is. Needs the hypeArtistPools treatment (per-artist pool) before/with the JSON commit. Applies to every scenario pairing quality_bonus with a named artist, not just this one.

demo_ethics_one.notes: Rewrite the opening text. "The demo — the one that made me sign {artistName}. There's a co-writer on it: uncleared, uncredited, and as of this morning, lawyered. I played that tape for this whole building and said I'd found a complete artist. Turns out I found most of one. I can make this quiet, I can make it right, or we cut the song again from zero — but if it gets loud before the ink dries on the profile pieces, it isn't their name that eats it. It's mine."
